message:
feat(parity): NodeView set algebra for all graph classes

Closes franken_networkx-53lm and franken_networkx-16pl.

Adds __or__, __and__, __sub__, and __xor__ methods to:
- NodeView (Graph)
- DiNodeView (DiGraph)
- MultiGraphNodeView (MultiGraph)
- MultiDiGraphNodeView (MultiDiGraph)

All graph classes now support set operations like:
  G.nodes | {'d'}  # union
  G.nodes & {'b'}  # intersection
  G.nodes - {'a'}  # difference
  G.nodes ^ {'b', 'd'}  # symmetric difference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
